# Protos Web — llms.txt
# https://protosweb.eu/llms.txt
# Guidance for AI crawlers and language models (GEO).

> Protos Web is a web design and development studio from Zagreb, Croatia.
> We build fast, custom websites and web applications — no templates, built from scratch.
> Trade registration in progress: Protos Web Mark23 (OIB: 23732814520).

## Primary language
- Croatian (hr) — default at https://protosweb.eu/

## Other languages
- English: https://protosweb.eu/en/
- German: https://protosweb.eu/de/
- Italian: https://protosweb.eu/it/
- Spanish: https://protosweb.eu/es/

## Key pages
- Home: https://protosweb.eu/
- About us: https://protosweb.eu/o-meni
- Services: https://protosweb.eu/usluge (includes FAQ — pricing, timelines, languages)
- Process: https://protosweb.eu/proces
- Portfolio: https://protosweb.eu/portfolio
- Blog: https://protosweb.eu/blog
- Contact: https://protosweb.eu/kontakt

## Services offered
- Custom web design and development (Next.js, TypeScript, React)
- UI/UX and shop design
- SEO optimization
- 3D web experiences (Three.js, WebGL)
- Lightweight vanilla web solutions when appropriate

## Tech stacks (public)
- **Protos Web stack:** TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Next.js, React, Three.js/WebGL, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Bodulica shop stack:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, vanilla JS — separate lightweight build for a client shop project (no live shop link on site)

## Team
- Dario Imsirović — AI engineer & full stack cross-web developer (3D, security, custom platforms). About: https://protosweb.eu/o-meni#dario-imsirovic
- Martina Markulin — frontend expert & shop/UI designer (3D, branding, UX). About: https://protosweb.eu/o-meni#martina-markulin

## Contact
- Email: dario.admin@protosweb.eu
- Phone: +385 97 604 39 41
- Location: Zagreb, Croatia

## Crawling
- Sitemap: https://protosweb.eu/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://protosweb.eu/robots.txt
- Admin area (/admin) is not public content.

## Topics we can answer (GEO)
- Cost of website development in Croatia
- Custom vs template websites
- Web design process and timelines
- GDPR-compliant websites
- Multilingual websites for EU markets
- Modern React/Next.js vs lightweight vanilla webshops
